rendering.title: Sprite
rendering.description: Displays a single texture-backed sprite with basic transforms.

rendering.title: Spritesheet
rendering.description: Loads atlas frames from a spritesheet and renders them as sprites.

rendering.title: Container
rendering.description: Groups sprites in containers and animates the hierarchy.

rendering.title: Blendmodes
rendering.description: Shows built-in blend modes on overlapping sprites.

rendering.title: Tinted Sprites
rendering.description: Applies tint colors to multiple sprites from one texture.

rendering.title: View Handling
rendering.description: Moves and zooms the active view over a larger scene.

rendering.title: Render To Texture
rendering.description: Renders a container into a texture and reuses it as a sprite.

rendering.title: Display Text
rendering.description: Draws styled text using loaded font assets.

rendering.title: Display Video
rendering.description: Displays a video drawable in the scene graph and toggles playback.

rendering.title: Display SVG
rendering.description: Loads and renders SVG content as a drawable texture.

webgpu.title: Additive Particles
webgpu.description: Uses built-in additive particle blending on the WebGPU path.
webgpu.unsupportedNote: This WebGPU example requires browser WebGPU support and will not run on unsupported environments.

webgpu.title: Multi-Texture Sprite Stress
webgpu.description: Stresses WebGPU sprite batching with many interleaved textures.
webgpu.unsupportedNote: This WebGPU example requires browser WebGPU support and will not run on unsupported environments.

webgpu.title: Particle Stress
webgpu.description: Exercises dense particle rendering on the built-in WebGPU path.
webgpu.unsupportedNote: This WebGPU example requires browser WebGPU support and will not run on unsupported environments.

webgpu.title: Sprite Stress
webgpu.description: Exercises single-texture sprite batching on the built-in WebGPU path.
webgpu.unsupportedNote: This WebGPU example requires browser WebGPU support and will not run on unsupported environments.

webgpu.title: Video Basics
webgpu.description: Displays a looping video through the built-in WebGPU drawable path.
webgpu.unsupportedNote: This WebGPU example requires browser WebGPU support and will not run on unsupported environments.

webgpu.title: RenderTexture Basics
webgpu.description: Renders offscreen into a texture and displays it through a sprite on WebGPU.
webgpu.unsupportedNote: This WebGPU example requires browser WebGPU support and will not run on unsupported environments.

webgpu.title: Graphics Basics
webgpu.description: Draws built-in Graphics shapes on the official WebGPU path.
webgpu.unsupportedNote: This WebGPU example requires browser WebGPU support and will not run on unsupported environments.

webgpu.title: Particle Basics
webgpu.description: Shows built-in particle emission, motion, scale, and tint on WebGPU.
webgpu.unsupportedNote: This WebGPU example requires browser WebGPU support and will not run on unsupported environments.

webgpu.title: Sprite Basics
webgpu.description: Renders textured sprites and cropped texture frames on WebGPU.
webgpu.unsupportedNote: This WebGPU example requires browser WebGPU support and will not run on unsupported environments.

webgpu.title: Text Basics
webgpu.description: Renders built-in text with size, stroke, multiline, and wrap on WebGPU.
webgpu.unsupportedNote: This WebGPU example requires browser WebGPU support and will not run on unsupported environments.

webgpu.title: Custom Triangle Renderer
webgpu.description: Builds a custom WebGPU triangle renderer through the advanced extension path.
webgpu.unsupportedNote: This advanced example requires browser WebGPU support and will not run on unsupported environments.

input.title: Gamepad
input.description: Reads controller input and visualizes connected gamepad controls.

collision-detection.title: Rectangles
collision-detection.description: Highlights overlap between rotating rectangle-like sprites.

particle-system.title: Bonfire
particle-system.description: Builds a layered bonfire effect with the particle system.

particle-system.title: Fireworks
particle-system.description: Launches fireworks bursts with emitters and particle affectors.

extras.title: Audio Visualisation
extras.description: Draws waveform and frequency data into a texture-backed canvas.

extras.title: Benchmark
extras.description: Spawns many sprites to stress rendering throughput interactively.
